scripts.deploy: bun run deploy:worker && bun run queues:configure
scripts.format: oxfmt --write src test package.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts wrangler.jsonc
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check src test package.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts wrangler.jsonc
scripts.queues:configure: wrangler queues consumer worker remove sync-realtime-data-jobs sync-realtime-data || true && wrangler queues consumer worker add sync-realtime-data-jobs sync-realtime-data --batch-size 1 --batch-timeout 5 --message-retries 3 --max-concurrency 2 && wrangler queues consumer worker remove sync-realtime-data-premium-race-jobs sync-realtime-data || true && wrangler queues consumer worker add sync-realtime-data-premium-race-jobs sync-realtime-data --batch-size 1 --batch-timeout 5 --message-retries 3 --max-concurrency 4 && wrangler queues consumer worker remove sync-realtime-data-running-style-jobs sync-realtime-data || true && wrangler queues consumer worker add sync-realtime-data-running-style-jobs sync-realtime-data --batch-size 1 --batch-timeout 5 --message-retries 3 --max-concurrency 1 && wrangler queues consumer worker remove sync-realtime-data-win5-jobs sync-realtime-data || true && wrangler queues consumer worker add sync-realtime-data-win5-jobs sync-realtime-data --batch-size 1 --batch-timeout 5 --message-retries 3 --max-concurrency 2
